description: When a scripted constructor of a cross-compartment wrapper was invoked and the Baseline IC fell back to the NewPlainObject runtime helper, the helper used the JSContext realm rather than the shape realm — triggering the CCW realm-consistency assert `obj->maybeCCWRealm() == this` at Realm.cpp:445 once a metadata-builder side effect cross-compartment allocation kicked in (enableShellAllocationMetadataBuilder + newGlobal). sec-high csectype-uaf realm-confusion assert. Fix: switch realm in the NewPlainObject fallback (git 76e93f9f269b, jcoppeard, 2021-11-09).
